details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level subdirectories: src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/ all present. reports/audit/ present but reports/board/ is missing.

reports/board/ directory missing. memory_bank/ has key docs (report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md, systemPatterns.md, TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md). .cursor/automations/ exists with README.md and specs. reports/audit/ exists. reports/board/ does not exist.

Moltbot code and references found in active code/config paths (not excluded audit/docs). moltbot/ directory contains 5 Python modules (sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py). Scripts referencing molt/moltbot: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py.
